raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A green can and an apple are on a table. The green can is a cylindrical container with a top opening; the apple is a round fruit. STRATEGY - To knock the can over, push it with a finger or a tool. Since no tool is visible, use the gripper to grasp the can's body and apply a force to tip it. Failure mode: if the can is too stable, it may not tip. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the can body for a stable grasp; Step 2 grasp the can body; Step 3 apply a force to tip the can.**
Goal: tipped(green_can)
Scene: green_can, apple, table
Step 1: reach(green_can)
  affordance_region: the body of the green can
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, green_can, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, green_can) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(green_can)
  affordance_region: the body of the green can
  contact: holding(green_can) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(green_can)
Step 3: push(green_can)
  affordance_region: the body of the green can
  contact: contact(gripper, green_can) [progress]
  spatial: force(gripper, green_can, tip) [completion]
  direction: push_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: tipped(green_can)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the green can
the body of the green can
the body of the green can
